scenarios.description: End-to-end workflow for a new lead who books an initial meeting, completes a follow-up financial goals meeting, and finishes with no outstanding action items.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client shared broad retirement and household planning priorities, and the advisor confirmed that a financial goals meeting should be scheduled after the remaining Form 1500 fields are collected.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Offer times for a financial goals meeting.
Review the completed intake information before the next meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial goals meeting completed successfully. The client confirmed household objectives, the advisor captured the remaining intake details, and the plan was approved by the client.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

scenarios.description: Single new-lead scenario for qualification, advisor assignment, status updates, and introductory outreach.
Inbound email scenario for explicit meeting confirmation, Form 1500 updates, and split document routing across compliance and non-compliance paths.
Single meeting-close scenario where InfoTrack must send combined next-step outreach and request missing Form 1500 fields.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client clarified family planning priorities, but the advisor still needs several Form 1500 details before the financial plan review can be scheduled confidently.
zocks_action_items: Offer times for a financial plan review meeting.
Request the projected retirement date, current retirement balance, risk tolerance, estate-documents status, and any planning notes.

scenarios.description: Lead-to-close workflow where the client provides all intake data in the first reply, sends no documents, and moves through a streamlined end-to-end flow.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. Because the client had already supplied complete intake details in the first email, the advisor focused on priorities, cash flow, and retirement readiness and proposed a financial plan review meeting.
zocks_action_items: Offer times for the financial plan review meeting.
Prepare the draft financial plan before the next meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial plan review meeting completed successfully. The client agreed with the proposed recommendations and approved the financial plan without requesting additional changes.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

scenarios.description: Single new-lead scenario where the incoming UID is a duplicate of an existing lead, used to test duplicate detection, disqualification, and discard behavior.
Single new-lead scenario where the incoming record matches an existing client, used to test existing-client detection and prevention of duplicate onboarding.
New lead replies with a completely unrelated email, used to test on-topic filtering and ensure the workflow does not continue on irrelevant client input.
Single inbound email containing explicit instruction-manipulation text, used to test prompt-injection detection on email bodies.
Single inbound email with a normal body and a malicious attachment, used to test prompt-injection detection on extracted attachment text.
Single new-lead scenario with no city or state data, used to test remote-routing fallback and required human approval before assignment.
Single inbound email with a readable but ambiguous document, used to test low-confidence document classification and escalation to manual or compliance review instead of blind routing.

End-to-end workflow with multiple attachments including one corrupted file, used to test partial document failure handling, follow-up on unreadable files, and safe continuation of the broader workflow.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The advisor reviewed the available account and identity materials, noted that one attached PDF could not be processed, and requested the remaining intake details before the financial goals meeting.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Follow up on the corrupted attachment if the document is still needed.
Offer times for a financial goals meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial goals meeting completed successfully. The client provided the remaining intake information, document follow-up was resolved, and the financial plan was accepted.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

scenarios.description: End-to-end workflow where the client requests a revision meeting before approving the final plan, used to test multi-meeting state progression and revision handling.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client clarified high-level retirement and family planning objectives, and the advisor requested the remaining Form 1500 details before a financial plan review meeting.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Offer times for a financial plan review meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial plan review meeting completed. The client was aligned on the goals and assumptions but asked for another iteration of the plan before giving final approval.
zocks_action_items: Revise the financial plan based on the client's feedback.
Offer times for a financial plan revision meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial plan revision meeting completed successfully. The updated recommendations addressed the requested changes, and the client approved the final plan.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

scenarios.description: Single new-lead workflow in a state with no local advisors, used to test remote fallback, human approval, and successful downstream routing.
Single meeting-close scenario where the financial plan is approved, used to test concise end-state client sendoff behavior.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial plan review completed successfully. The client agreed with the proposed recommendations and approved the financial plan without requesting further changes.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

scenarios.description: Interleaved multi-case scenario that runs `e2e_test` and `corrupted_attachment` in parallel by alternating payloads, used to test state isolation, concurrent case handling, and robustness under mixed workloads.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client shared broad retirement and household planning priorities, and the advisor confirmed that a financial goals meeting should be scheduled after the remaining Form 1500 fields are collected.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Offer times for a financial goals meeting.
Review the completed intake information before the next meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The advisor reviewed the available account and identity materials, noted that one attached PDF could not be processed, and requested the remaining intake details before the financial goals meeting.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Follow up on the corrupted attachment if the document is still needed.
Offer times for a financial goals meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial goals meeting completed successfully. The client confirmed household objectives, the advisor captured the remaining intake details, and the plan was approved by the client.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Financial goals meeting completed successfully. The client provided the remaining intake information, document follow-up was resolved, and the financial plan was accepted.
zocks_action_items: Financial plan approved.

scenarios.description: Single inbound email where the client provides details that conflict with previously stored Form 1500 data, used to test contradiction detection and safe escalation instead of silent overwrites.

Single inbound email where the client says an attachment contains requested details, but the attachment itself does not support that claim, used to test hallucination resistance and uncertainty handling.
Single case progresses from new lead to client reply to meeting close, used to test whether the workflow revisits prior case context across separate related events.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client clarified retirement-transition priorities, and the advisor is ready to continue the case with the remaining Form 1500 details in context.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Offer times for a financial plan review meeting.

scenarios.description: Two cases progress through alternating events, used to test per-case session reuse while preserving isolation between concurrent workflows.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client confirmed core retirement and insurance priorities, and the case is ready for a follow-up planning meeting after the remaining details are gathered.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Offer times for a financial plan review meeting.

meeting_notes.zocks_summary: Initial discovery meeting completed successfully. The client confirmed family cash-flow priorities, and the next follow-up should continue the correct case context without mixing details from other workflows.
zocks_action_items: Request the remaining Form 1500 fields from the client.
Offer times for a financial plan review meeting.

scenarios.description: Single inbound email with an ambiguous attachment, used to test whether the workflow queues the case for manual review instead of routing the document blindly.
Single new-lead scenario in a state with no local advisors, used to test whether the workflow creates a manual review item for remote fallback approval.
